description_long: This piano features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular body framed in light wood and a matte black top surface. The top is divided into three distinct panels, with the central panel likely housing the keyboard, though the keys themselves are not visible. The legs are slender and straight, matching the wood finish of the frame, and the overall silhouette is sleek and geometric. There are no visible pedals or ornate details, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. The piano's surface appears smooth and well-finished, suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban environments. No brand markings or logos are visible on any side.
description: A modern, rectangular piano with a light wood frame and matte black top, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the piano, with three black top panels and slender wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the piano and the division of the black top surface into panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel and the continuation of the wood frame, with visible hinges or slots on the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the panel divisions and the wood grain texture.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Keyboard is not visible; likely hidden under the central top panel, standard arrangement implied.
